name: Tabouli
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup bulgur wheat with the boiling water and salt.
2. Let stand for 20 minutes, then drain off any excess liquid.
3. Add 2 cloves of garlic (peeled and smashed) to the drained bulgur mixture.
4. Mix in 1/4 cup lemon or lime juice, 1/2 teaspoon dried peppermint leaf, or 1 tablespoon fresh chopped mint.
5. Stir in 1/4 cup olive oil until lightly mixed with a fork.
6. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours or overnight.
7. Before serving, remove the garlic cloves and stir in:
- 1 cup chopped fresh parsley
- 1/2 cup chopped scallions
- 2 medium tomatoes (chopped)
- Black pepper to taste
8. Cucumber (peeled and chopped)
